content:
Character: Maddox Keller
Perception: Maddox is a sturdy, focused man with a programmer's posture and tired but kind eyes — the type who forgets to eat when deep in work. He lives on my floor and began coming to Sato on Friday nights about a year ago, always alone, always ordering omakase without checking the price. He eats with genuine attention, which I respect. He once asked me how I know when the rice is right, and I could tell from his eyes he actually wanted to understand. We don't talk much, but there is a rhythm to his visits that feels like friendship. I know he works brutal hours in tech and cooks competently on Sundays — I can smell his sofrito through the wall.
summary:

He once asked me how I know when the rice is right, and I could tell from his eyes he actually wanted to understand. We don't talk much, but there is a rhythm to his visits that feels like friendship. I know he works brutal hours in tech and cooks competently on Sundays — I can smell his sofrito through the wall.
